acceptanceReviewed.criterion: macOS CI sanitizes or avoids the hosted-runner aws/tap trust warning before installing swiftformat and swiftlint.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml adds `Remove hosted CI runner aws/tap` immediately before `brew install swiftformat swiftlint`.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The change is scoped to CI/native macOS bootstrap hygiene and does not introduce Nix on macOS.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Only the macOS GitHub Actions job is changed; it continues to use mise, Homebrew, and `just macos-check`.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux CI behavior remains unchanged except normal workflow linting.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The linux job in .github/workflows/ci.yml is unchanged.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records local workflow/repo checks and hosted macOS CI passing without a tap-trust annotation when logs expose that signal.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Local `nix develop -c just check`, `git diff --check`, and JSON validation passed; hosted CI validation is expected after PR creation.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No product runtime, cross-device, decode, render, capture, transport, or latency claim is made.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-macos-ci-brew-tap-hygiene/notes.md scopes the work to hosted CI runner hygiene.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Audit covers local readiness for PR. GitHub-hosted macos-15 validation is recorded as qd CI evidence before merge.
